title: All the small things
wikitext:
[]: All the small things... (SPOILERS)             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:08 pm I've got round to burning the camrip to dvd and I've been watching it on my TV. You can see a lot more detail as its on a much bigger screen and less glare. Anyways the point... i just noticed the shot of eva mark 6 on the moon is wearing liliths mask from nge so taking wild guess that the mark 6 is adam. either that or mark 6 is lilith and lilith is adam. I'm normally kinda against pointless speculation. i think everyone but penpen and been accused of being adam but yeah... Anyone else noticed any little details that got them thinking?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jul 30, 2009 9:50 pm not to flush this thread down the crapper but when I saw that title, I thought this was going to involve this song from this group anyway, who knows, with even 3I looking doubtful, anything's possible at this point I still hold fast to the a certain unused part of the original Eva Proposal which makes Reichu seems goes apesh*t everytime it's brought up*** ***(start with these if you want to know what I'm referring to: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=146863#146863 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=50853#50853 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=258276#post258276)

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:02 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: not to flush this thread down the crapper but when I saw that title, I thought this was going to involve this song from this group anyway, who knows, with even 3I looking doubtful, anything's possible at this point I still hold fast to the a certain unused part of the original Eva Proposal which makes Reichu seems goes apesh*t everytime it's brought up*** ***(start with these if you want to know what I'm referring to: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=146863#146863 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=50853#50853 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?p=258276#post258276)

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Thu Jul 30, 2009 10:47 pm She dont go apeshit.......She go Bousou.....She go BERSERKER....... Read the Profile pal.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Jul 31, 2009 3:18 pm Another "small thing" that I noticed, when Saha peirces Unit 01's hands, Unit 01 opens its mouth almost in pain, does this mean that Evas can react to the pain the pilot feels as well as the pilot experiencing what happens to the Eva or would this simply be something that would happen as a medium of showing pain?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Sat Aug 01, 2009 11:20 am wonderluster wrote: Another "small thing" that I noticed, when Saha peirces Unit 01's hands, Unit 01 opens its mouth almost in pain, does this mean that Evas can react to the pain the pilot feels as well as the pilot experiencing what happens to the Eva or would this simply be something that would happen as a medium of showing pain?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Aug 01, 2009 5:44 pm OH MY GOSH.....That didn't answer my question at all.
